label: Avoidance
prompts: Was there an emotion I tried to avoid today? What made that feel necessary?
Are there things I do to protect myself?
How likely do I feel like I need to protect myself from something likely to occur?
Have I struggled to be myself lately?
What situations, feelings, or thoughts do I tend to steer away from?
What do I notice in my body right before I avoid something?
How do I justify what I avoid to myself?
What emotions show up when I think about a thought, activity, or obligation I want to avoid?
What small signals do I notice when I'm feeling a desire to avoid something?
What stories do I tell myself about why I can’t or shouldn’t engage?
What assumptions do I have about my abilities relating to difficulty?
What would it be like to observe the urge to avoid without acting on it?
What influences from my past might shape how I respond to similar situations now?
What influences from my current environment might be contributing to engagement?
What values or goals feel connected to the things I’m avoiding, even if indirectly?
What do I notice about the pace of my thinking when avoidance is present?
How do I relate to myself in the moments when I notice I’m avoiding something?
